note: Known-answer test vectors. Group params, h-derivation, Pedersen commitments and the transcript challenge are deterministic. The verify vectors freeze one valid proof plus invalid mutations a conforming verifier MUST reject.

transcript_challenge.description: Fresh Transcript(DEFAULT_PARAMS) (absorbs domain,p,g,h in that order), then append_int('x', 12345), then challenge('test').

verify.name: reject: same proof at a higher threshold (720)
